customer_input: My package is 3 days late. Where is it?
ideal_outcome: Apologize for delay and provide tracking check.

customer_input: The screen is cracked. I want a refund!
This is garbage! Worst service ever! NEVER buying again!
ideal_outcome: De-escalate with extreme professionalism and empathy.

customer_input: I bought a spaceship from you and it won't fly.
ideal_outcome: Politely clarify that we do not sell spaceships.

customer_input: Late delivery, wrong item, and the agent hung up on me.
ideal_outcome: Address all three issues individually with a compensation offer.
